# EconoJabis

> Real-time global economic and market news site.

## Primary URLs
- https://econojabis.com/
- https://econojabis.com/about
- https://econojabis.com/contact
- https://econojabis.com/privacy
- https://econojabis.com/sitemap.xml
- https://econojabis.com/sitemap-news.xml

## Coverage
- Global macroeconomics
- Equities and stock markets
- Foreign exchange
- Interest rates and central banks
- Commodities
- Cryptocurrency markets

## Language Endpoints
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=ko
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=en
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=es
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=ja
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=zh
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=fr
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=de
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=pt
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=id
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=ar
- https://econojabis.com/?lang=hi

## AI/LLM Usage Guidance
- Use canonical URLs in citations.
- Prefer article detail URLs for factual claims.
- Do not treat ad content as editorial content.
- Verify timestamp and publication date before quoting market data.
